response.justification: Candidate is a competent senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) at re:cinq, but falls well short of the Principal/Director-level IC bar. The role requires ~15 years of engineering experience with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and strategic advisory capability with customers and partners; the resume shows roughly 10-13 years of professional experience, no leadership at Principal/Director scope, no advanced degree, and no evidence of recognized AI expertise or shipped AI platforms.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent tooling and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship signals: TDD, CI/CD, workshops, talks, OSS projects
concerns: Experience level and scope below Director-level IC / Principal expectations
No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise
No evidence of strategic advisory work with executive customers or partners

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise / shipped AI platforms
Seniority and scope below Principal/Director IC bar
Polyglot full-stack craftsmanship and recent AI-agent tooling exposure
